---
title: "MANTA Gallery"
---

MANTA Gallery is a collection of 3D pyvista-based interactive visualizations of landslide tsunami modeled by D-Claw. (MANTA: Modelling & Analytics for Nonlinear Tsunami Applications Platform is under development.)

## Core visualization concept

- Landslide material: hm, m, or Δb using magma
- Separate solid-fraction thresholds for water-like and landslide-dominated regions

## Gallery status

This repository is used as paper supplements.
